title: stylidium corymbosum
intro: Stylidium corymbosum, also known as the button cloak, is a rare species of flowering plant native to Western Australia, belonging to the family Stylidiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Stylidium corymbosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
